macro.title: Pending Home Sales Hit Highest Level in Nearly 4 Years
macro.what: More homebuyers jumped into the market as mortgage rates came down temporarily last week, but it’s still slower than past springs
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
